sourcePrompt: A Vietnamese sampan, the flat-bottomed wooden river boat of the Mekong, about five meters long and barely a meter wide. A long narrow open hull of lapped planks, the bow and stern both rising gently from a low waist, two or three plank thwart benches across the middle, a small section of cargo decking, and a single long steering. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
